screenshots.caption: 官网首页，展示品牌、标语和模型卡片
首页功能卡片区：Unified Access、Policy Routing、Observability、Reliable Delivery
模型定价页，展示 GPT-4o、Claude 3.7 Sonnet 等模型价格
定价页更多模型（Claude Opus、GPT-4.1 系列）
关于页面，展示服务条款和隐私政策
文档中心，左侧导航含 Claude Code 代理配置等教程
登录页，支持用户名/密码和 linuxDo 第三方登录

warnings: web-only: 4Router is a pure Web API service, no desktop client installable package found on the website
android: android.enabled=false, sandbox not started; web-only product path
login-required: Console and Model pages require authentication, analyzed only the public-facing pages
broken-routes: /model and /documentation return 404; actual docs are at /docs
System Notice popup appears on first visit and blocks the homepage content
